rows.body: Hi {{first_name}}, Mykoal DeShazo with Adaxa Home (NMLS 1912347). You asked about a rate and term refinance at smartr8.com. Let us see your options. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help.
{{first_name}}, a rate and term refinance reworks your loan with no cash out, just a better rate, term, or payment. Want me to take a look?
If the market or your credit has moved, refinancing may help your payment, {{first_name}}. Send your goal and let us run your numbers.

rows.subject: Three reasons people refinance
rows.body:
A rate and term refinance can help in a few ways. It can ease your monthly payment. It can shorten your term so you own your home sooner. And it can drop mortgage insurance once you have the equity.

Reply with your goal and let us run your numbers.
{{first_name}}, a refinance can also shorten your term or drop mortgage insurance once you have the equity. Happy to explain the tradeoffs.
Still weighing it, {{first_name}}? When you are ready I can show your refinance options fast. Reply STOP to opt out.

rows.subject: Here when the timing is right, {{first_name}}
rows.preheader: Your refinance options are a quick conversation away.
rows.body:
No pressure on timing. When you want to check whether a refinance helps, I can put your options together quickly.

Call or text me anytime at (480) 206 9290.
{{first_name}}, I will keep your refinance request on file. Reach me anytime at (480) 206 9290. Reply STOP to opt out. Mykoal.
